name: Luciano Manhães de Andrade Filho
title: Prof. Dr.
bio: Associate Professor IV at UFJF and Team Leader of the UFJF group at CERN/ATLAS. B.Sc. in Electrical Engineering (UERJ, 2001), M.Sc. in Scientific Instrumentation (CBPF, 2004, sandwich at CERN), Ph.D. in Electrical Engineering (UFRJ/COPPE, 2009, sandwich at CERN), and two post-doctorates — PLC communications at UFJF (2009) and Nuclear Instrumentation at CERN (2021). Coordinator of the NIPSCERN Lab and member of the INCT CERN-Brasil (Instituto Nacional de Ciência e Tecnologia para Física de Altas Energias com o CERN). Expert in signal processing for calorimetry, FPGA-based systems, and machine learning applied to particle detectors. Web of Science: 1,256 works · 67,244 citations · h-index 118. Scopus: 1,207 works · 78,835 citations · h-index 124.

awards.title: Most-Liked Video — SEMIC 2025 ("Macro e Microcosmos: Fractais e a Física de Partículas")

name: Chrysthofer Arthur Amaro Afonso
title: B.Sc. Student
bio: Undergraduate researcher at NIPSCERN Lab (UFJF) and CERN collaborator since 2023. FAPEMIG scholar developing extensions to the Lorenzetti framework for 3D calorimeter event visualization and free-running trigger studies (CGV-WEB). Contributes to the SAPHO processor, YANC compilers, POLARIS IDE, and AURORA IDE. Acts as technical co-supervisor (co-orientador) of undergraduate IC students. Member of the INCT CERN-Brasil (Instituto Nacional de Ciência e Tecnologia para Física de Altas Energias com o CERN). Participates in the Nordic Online Logic Seminar (NOLS) and the Young Network for Wittgensteinian Philosophy (YNWP).
awards: Gold Medal — International Physics and Culture Olympiad (IPhCO) (2019, 2021)
Silver Medal — International Physics and Culture Olympiad (IPhCO) (2019, 2021)
Bronze Medal — International Physics and Culture Olympiad (IPhCO) (2019, 2020, 2021)
Gold Medal — Brazilian Astronomy and Astronautics Olympiad (OBA) (2020, 2021)
Gold Medal — Brazilian National Science Olympiad (2021)
Honorable Mention — Brazilian Mathematics Olympiad OBMEP (2018, 2019, 2021)
Most-Liked Video — SEMIC 2025 ("Macro e Microcosmos: Fractais e a Física de Partículas")

name: Gabriel de Aquino Torres
bio: Undergraduate IC scholar (Bolsista CNPq) at NIPSCERN Lab (UFJF), B.Sc. student in Electrical Engineering – Electronic Systems. Contributing to the graphical interface of POLARIS IDE and the YAWT Wave Tracer — SAPHO's signal visualisation tool. Also working on particle detection in calorimetry using deep learning techniques, under supervision of Prof. Dr. Luciano Manhães de Andrade Filho.
